title: An unfolding problem with combination tools

posts.name: Heng Yang
posts.text:
Dear expert,
I am trying to use combination tools to do unfolding.
At the beginning, I only wrote the statistic uncertainty in the datacard, then it succeeded.
But after I added more uncertainties on the datacards, such as the pileup and prefile uncertainties, and then it failed.
The cards without pileup and prefile uncertainties which succeeded are :/afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/successcard/z_pt_bin_*.txt
and the output is : /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/successcard/output.txt
The cards with more uncertainties which failed are :/afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/failcard/z_pt_bin_*.txt
and the error is: /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/failcard/error.txt
the command I ran for both is : /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/run.sh
Do you have some suggestions?
Cheers,
Heng
posts.cooked_html:
Dear expert,

I am trying to use combination tools to do unfolding.

At the beginning, I only wrote the statistic uncertainty in the datacard, then it succeeded.

But after I added more uncertainties on the datacards, such as the pileup and prefile uncertainties, and then it failed.

The cards without pileup and prefile uncertainties which succeeded are :/afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/successcard/z_pt_bin_*.txt
and the output is : /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/successcard/output.txt

The cards with more uncertainties which failed are :/afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/failcard/z_pt_bin_*.txt
and the error is: /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/failcard/error.txt

the command I ran for both is : /afs/desy.de/user/h/hengyang/public/combination/run.sh

Do you have some suggestions?

Cheers,
Heng

posts.name: Heng Yang
posts.text: I was wondering does anyone have some suggestions?
posts.cooked_html: I was wondering does anyone have some suggestions?

posts.name: Adinda de Wit
posts.text:
Dear Heng,
The error message (“no observed data data_obs in the workspace”) suggests that the combined datacard did not get produced correctly. Indeed, running your command I see, in all.txt: "   if pdf not in [“trG”, “dFD”, “dFD2”] and errline[b][p] < 0: raise ValueError(‘Found “%s” in the nuisances affecting %s in %s. This would lead to NANs later on, so please fix it.’%(r,p,b))
ValueError: Error reading line 18 of file z_pt_bin_6.txt: Found “-0.0717523847642” in the nuisances affecting genbin4 in recobin6. This would lead to NANs later on, so please fix it."
So I think you have a typo in z_pt_bin_6.txt - that part of the line was probably supposed to say “- 0.0717523847642”.
I note that this would correspond to a very large uncertainty, which I don’t think you would expect for this uncertainty source, but that is of course another matter.
Best,
Adinda

ValueError: Error reading line 18 of file z_pt_bin_6.txt: Found “-0.0717523847642” in the nuisances affecting genbin4 in recobin6. This would lead to NANs later on, so please fix it."

So I think you have a typo in z_pt_bin_6.txt - that part of the line was probably supposed to say “- 0.0717523847642”.

I note that this would correspond to a very large uncertainty, which I don’t think you would expect for this uncertainty source, but that is of course another matter.

Best,
Adinda

posts.name: Heng Yang
posts.text:
Dear Adinda,
It is exactly like what you said. It works after I change the negative number.
Thanks a lot.
Cheers,
Heng
